# defectdojo_test (Data Source)

DefectDojo Test data source

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "defectdojo_test" "example" {
  id = "1"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `id` (String) Identifier

### Read-Only

- `branch_tag` (String) Tag or branch that was tested
- `build_id` (String) Build ID that was tested
- `commit_hash` (String) Commit hash tested
- `description` (String) Description of the Test
- `engagement` (Number) ID of the Engagement
- `environment` (Number) ID of the environment
- `lead` (Number) ID of the lead user
- `percent_complete` (Number) Percentage of test completion
- `scan_type` (String) Type of scan
- `tags` (Set of String) Tags for this Test
- `target_end` (String) End datetime of the Test (RFC3339 format)
- `target_start` (String) Start datetime of the Test (RFC3339 format)
- `test_type` (Number) ID of the Test Type
- `title` (String) Title of the Test
- `version` (String) Version tested
